title: centaurea rouyi subsp. suffrutescens
intro: Centaurea rouyi subsp. suffrutescens is a subspecies of the Centaurea rouyi plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Centaurea rouyi subsp. suffrutescens include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help reduce swelling and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
